Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. This dismissal pertains to the remaining First Amended cross complaint. Proceedings not reported. (610)
